codeReview.summary: This fix adequately addresses the prior scrutiny failure for VAL-CROSS-006. Commit `1ce5893` adds a new checked-in mission-verification artifact, `.factory/validation/mission-verification/feature-owned-proof-followup.json`, and that bundle explicitly provides newly-owned assertion mapping for restart, latest-session restore, project auto-selection, and sidebar reselection on `/mission` instead of relying on older milestone artifacts alone. The VAL-CROSS-006 entry now cites concrete automated coverage in `test/missionPage.test.ts`, `test/sessionStore.test.ts`, and `test/rpcNotificationMapping.test.ts`, plus Mission-GUI-TEST interactive artifacts from `foundation-routing.json` and `restore-bootstrap.json`, which resolves the blocking gap called out in the prior review.

sharedStateObservations.observation: This completed proof feature has no recorded worker session, transcript entry, or matching handoff, and the checked-in proof artifact uses a different internal `featureId` than the mission feature being reviewed. The proof is still reviewable from the checked-in artifact and commit diff, but traceability falls back to `features.json` plus the commit instead of the usual handoff/transcript chain.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/clive/.factory/missions/a340063e-1391-4186-b698-8db9955f8eda/features.json:713-737 shows `workerSessionIds: []` and `completedWorkerSessionId: null` for `mission-cross-flow-restart-reselection-proof`; no matching handoff file exists under `/Users/clive/.factory/missions/a340063e-1391-4186-b698-8db9955f8eda/handoffs`; /Users/clive/dev/droi/.worktrees/droi--happy-yak-p5n5/.factory/validation/mission-verification/feature-owned-proof-followup.json:2 records `featureId: "mission-cross-flow-feature-owned-proof-followup"`.

summary: Scrutiny passed. Although no worker transcript or handoff exists for this proof-only follow-up, the checked-in artifact added in commit `1ce5893` now gives VAL-CROSS-006 feature-owned proof: it explicitly maps restart, latest-session restore, project auto-selection, and sidebar reselection recovery on `/mission` to concrete tests and Mission-GUI-TEST artifacts. I found no remaining blocking issue for VAL-CROSS-006.
